name: Apple-Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet with margarine.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream the margarine and brown sugar until smooth.
4. Add the egg and beat until the batter is smooth.
5. Combine the white flour, whole-wheat flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a separate bowl.
6. Mix the dry ingredients into the batter alternately with milk, stirring gently after each addition.
7. Stir in the raisins and chopped walnuts.
8. Fold in the diced cooking apples until evenly distributed.
9. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto the prepared cookie sheet.
10. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
